title: Financial Institutions Embrace Prediction Markets Amid Regulatory Uncertainty
summary: Despite ongoing legal battles, financial institutions are increasingly involved in prediction markets.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the growing acceptance of prediction markets despite regulatory concerns.

title: AI Thought Experiment Triggers Stock Market Volatility
summary: An AI-related thought experiment on Substack caused a significant downturn in the stock market.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the market's sensitivity to AI-related news and potential disruptions.

title: Kalshi Defends Its Prediction Market Model
summary: Kalshi CEO argues that their platform, which allows betting on various events, is not gambling but beneficial for society.

title: Trump's Sons Discuss 'Retribution' at Crypto Event

title: Oil Surges, Stocks Drop Amid Inflation and Stagnation Fears
